# Further information

Further information on responsibilities for security assessment activities as part of continuously monitoring the security of systems can be found in the ‘System owners’ section of the [Guidelines for cyber security roles](#626dab35-81ab-45fe-8c12-0faff1c23c07).

Further information on using AI models for security assessment activities can be found in ASD’s [Opportunities for AI in cyber defence](#aff92212-4cd2-459a-9ba1-d4dd1815ebec) publication.
